phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora apre il centro visitatori, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-ra AH-preh il CEN-tro vee-see-ta-TOH-ree, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si acquista il biglietto del parco, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KO-meh see ah-KWEE-sta il bee-LYET-toh del PAR-ko, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: Directly at the entrance cash desk.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to buy the Cinque Terre card
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si compra la Cinque Terre Card?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see KOM-prah lah CHEEN-kweh TER-reh card?
phrases.cultural_note: The Cinque Terre Card includes the main coastal path and trains between the five villages.

responses.english: At the stations at Riomaggiore or Monterosso.
responses.phonetic: AL-leh stah-TSYOH-nee dee ryo-maj-JOH-reh oh mon-teh-ROS-soh.
responses.french: Alle stazioni di Riomaggiore o Monterosso.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which trail is easiest for beginners
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quale sentiero è più adatto per chi non è allenato?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-leh sen-TYEH-roh eh PYOO ah-DAT-toh per kee non eh al-leh-NAH-toh?

responses.english: Path number five, between Monterosso and Vernazza.
responses.phonetic: eel sen-TYEH-roh noo-MEH-roh CHEEN-kweh, trah mon-teh-ROS-soh eh ver-NAT-tsah.
responses.french: Il sentiero numero cinque, tra Monterosso e Vernazza.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the Via dell'Amore is currently open
phrases.text_local: Scusi, la Via dell'Amore è aperta al momento?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, lah VEE-ah del-lah-MOH-reh eh ah-PER-tah al moh-MEN-toh?

responses.english: Check at the station, the situation changes.
responses.phonetic: veh-REE-fee-kee AL-lah stah-TSYOH-neh, lah see-too-ah-TSYOH-neh KAM-byah.
responses.french: Verifichi alla stazione, la situazione cambia.
